result.text: Scan: a classic vessel, {n:50-70} years old, chrome at ceremonial polish levels. The driver wears {pick:driving gloves|a flat cap|sunglasses older than us}. Request its story, or pace it in tribute?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

story.text: Story received: {pick:three owners, one family|rebuilt from a barn find|won its class at a show nobody remembers but everybody misses}. It has a name. Do we ask the name?

name.text: The name is {pick:Eleanor|Betsy|The Duchess|Old Blue}. Of course it is. Perfect. Log it in the registry of good ships, where we also live.

priv.text: Wise. A name unspoken keeps its power. The chrome flared in what we choose to believe was approval.

pace.text: Tribute pace held for one respectful mile. Two eras of machine, briefly side by side. The old one purred. Ours hummed back.
